prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is Terminations & balancing, part of the HVAC-R scope. The observed field condition is: damper positions vs. balance report mismatch. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: SMACNA, TAB reports. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: Measurement check: Terminations & balancing (commercial project)
